allies.rationale_text: Cognitive-load-theory supports schema-acquisition by reducing working-memory strain so chunking and scaffolding can build stable mental structure.
allies.source_quote: CLT emphasizes optimizing the learning environment to reduce strain on working memory, which frees up capacity for the encoding process necessary for schema formation.

allies.rationale_text: Abstraction helps schema-acquisition compress detail into a usable map without losing the underlying structure people need to retrieve later.
allies.source_quote: Schemas are conceptual maps-deliberately organized, abstracted, and simplified visions of a complex intellectual landscape.

structured_tensions.tension_text: Schema-acquisition conflicts with representativeness-bias when familiar pattern labels replace context-specific diagnosis.
structured_tensions.source_quote: schema-acquisition vs representativeness-bias: schema-acquisition conflicts with representativeness-bias (representativeness bias) when familiar pattern labels replace context-specific diagnosis.

structured_tensions.tension_text: Schema-acquisition conflicts with first-principles-thinking when overlearned templates block reconstruction from base facts.
structured_tensions.source_quote: schema-acquisition vs first-principles-thinking: schema-acquisition conflicts with first-principles-thinking (first principles thinking) when overlearned templates block reconstruction from base facts.

structured_tensions.tension_text: Schema-acquisition conflicts with anchoring when the first schema encountered creates a reference point that distorts evaluation of a better-fitting schema.
structured_tensions.source_quote: schema-acquisition vs anchoring: schema-acquisition conflicts with anchoring (anchoring) when the first schema encountered creates a reference point that distorts the evaluation of subsequent, potentially better-fitting schemas.

curation_notes.summary: The source is strongest on CLT-backed map formation and an explicit structured tension block around template misuse, so the file stays close to those preserved seams.
donor_drops: Did not preserve broader communication or design-thinking relation sprawl beyond the cleanest current-vocabulary supports and tensions.
open_questions: Circle-of-competence is source-real in the risk section, but the current first-order relation surface is cleaner around the explicit tension block.
